PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/ACBSUL/acbsul-site" -ErrorAction Stop; "EXISTE: $\($r.full_name\) | private: $\($r.private\) | branch padrao: $\($r.default_branch\) | size KB: $\($r.size\)" } catch { "ERRO: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\) - $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell([Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol = [Net.SecurityProtocolType]::Tls12; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/ACBSUL/acbsul-site" -ErrorAction Stop; "EXISTE: $\($r.full_name\) | private: $\($r.private\) | branch padrao: $\($r.default_branch\) | size KB: $\($r.size\)" } catch { $code = $null; if \($_.Exception.Response\) { $code = [int]$_.Exception.Response.StatusCode }; "ERRO: HTTP $code - $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5030/servicos" -UseBasicParsing; $html = $r.Content; $checks = @\('Assistência Técnica Especializada em Compressores', 'manutenção preventiva de compressores consiste', 'Porto Alegre', 'Rio Grande do Sul', 'FAQPage', '"@type":"Service"', 'BreadcrumbList', 'distribuidora autorizada Atlas Copco', 'FleetLink'\); foreach \($c in $checks\) { $found = $html.Contains\($c\); "{0} -> {1}" -f $c, $found }; "h1 count: " + \([regex]::Matches\($html, '<h1'\)\).Count)

PowerShell($wc = New-Object System.Net.WebClient; $bytes = $wc.DownloadData\("http://localhost:5030/servicos"\); $html = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($bytes\); @\('Assistência Técnica Especializada em Compressores no RS', 'A manutenção preventiva de compressores consiste na troca programada', 'horímetro'\) | ForEach-Object { "{0} -> {1}" -f $_, $html.Contains\($_\) })

PowerShell($wc = New-Object System.Net.WebClient; $bytes = $wc.DownloadData\("http://localhost:5030/servicos"\); $html = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($bytes\); $html.Contains\('Assistência Técnica Especializada em Compressores'\))

\([^<]+\)

' -AllMatches\).Matches | Select-Object -First 5 | ForEach-Object { $_.Groups[1].Value }; try { $p = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5030/produtos/compressores-portateis/e-air-t500" -UseBasicParsing; "PDP e-air-t500 -> $\($p.StatusCode\)"; if \($p.Content -match '

\([^<]+\)

'\) { "H1: $\($Matches[1]\)" } } catch { "PDP erro: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5030 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { "Escutando na 5030 \(PIDs: $\($conn.OwningProcess -join ','\)\)" } else { "NADA escutando na 5030" }; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='node.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'astro' } | Select-Object ProcessId, @{n='Cmd';e={\($_.CommandLine -split 'astro'\)[1]}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($astro = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='node.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'astro|run dev' }; "Matando: $\($astro.ProcessId -join ', '\)"; $astro.ProcessId | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $left = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5030 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($left\) { "AINDA na 5030: $\($left.OwningProcess -join ','\)" } else { "5030 livre" })

PowerShell(for \($i=0; $i -lt 25; $i++\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5030/produtos" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; break } catch { Start-Sleep 1 } }; if \($r\) { "/produtos -> $\($r.StatusCode\)"; \($r.Content | Select-String -Pattern '

\([^<]+\)

' -AllMatches\).Matches | Select-Object -First 4 | ForEach-Object { 'card: ' + $_.Groups[1].Value } } else { 'sem resposta de /produtos' })

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5030 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "Listeners na 5030: $\($conn.OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique\)"; \(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='node.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'astro.js dev' }\).Count.ToString\(\) + " processo\(s\) astro dev")

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5030 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c | Select-Object -First 1 LocalAddress,LocalPort,OwningProcess | Format-List; $p = Get-Process -Id $c[0].OwningProcess; "Processo: $\($p.ProcessName\) \(PID $\($p.Id\)\)" } else { "Nada escutando na porta 5030" })

PowerShell($sw = [System.Diagnostics.Stopwatch]::StartNew\(\); try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5030/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60; $sw.Stop\(\); "status=$\($r.StatusCode\) tempo=$\([math]::Round\($sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds,2\)\)s tamanho=$\($r.RawContentLength\) bytes" } catch { $sw.Stop\(\); "ERRO apos $\([math]::Round\($sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds,2\)\)s: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(foreach \($u in @\("http://localhost:5030/servicos","http://localhost:5030/admin/leads","http://localhost:5030/produtos"\)\) { $sw=[System.Diagnostics.Stopwatch]::StartNew\(\); try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $sw.Stop\(\); "$u => $\($r.StatusCode\) em $\([math]::Round\($sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds,2\)\)s" } catch { $sw.Stop\(\); "$u => ERRO apos $\([math]::Round\($sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds,2\)\)s: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell(1..2 | ForEach-Object { $sw=[System.Diagnostics.Stopwatch]::StartNew\(\); try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5030/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 45; $sw.Stop\(\); "tentativa $_ => $\($r.StatusCode\) em $\([math]::Round\($sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds,2\)\)s" } catch { $sw.Stop\(\); "tentativa $_ => ERRO apos $\([math]::Round\($sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds,2\)\)s" } })
